case_title: PAN MAGNA GROUP VS LA GONDOLA CAFE-BOUDAMES GEORGE (OWNER)

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL TO GEORGE BOUDAMES LA GONDOLA CAFE RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAN MAGNA GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LA GONDOLA CAFE-BOUDAMES GEORGE (OWNER) $1,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,870.00, REQUEST FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION DENIED & DISMMISED WITHOUT PREJUDICE DUE TO LACK OF JURISDICTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LA GONDOLA CAFE-BOUDAMES GEORGE (OWNER)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,350.00 FILED BY PAN MAGNA GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT LA GONDOLA CAFE-BOUDAMES GEORGE (OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
